mapper.select: SELECT job_no, job_title, to_char(job_date, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') as job_date, job_reply_cnt, job_hits, user_id , user_name FROM job WHERE ROWNUM <= 5 ORDER BY job_date DESC
SELECT flea_no, flea_title, to_char(flea_date, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') as flea_date, flea_reply_cnt, flea_hits, user_id , user_name FROM fleaMarket WHERE ROWNUM <= 5 ORDER BY flea_date DESC

SELECT roomRental_no, roomRental_title, to_char(roomRental_date, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') as roomRental_date, roomRental_reply_cnt, roomRental_hits, user_id , user_name FROM roomRental WHERE ROWNUM <= 5 ORDER BY roomRental_date DESC
SELECT com_no, com_title, to_char(com_date, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') as com_date, com_reply_cnt, com_hits, user_id , user_name FROM community WHERE ROWNUM <= 5 ORDER BY com_date DESC
